title: My old, dusty projects - part 2:Have some poop stuf-no, veg replace-no, A DUMB SONG!
description:
Well, got about 30 seconds of poop material.......so have a  side of .veg and a cheesy original song! 
Also, if you can guess which part of which one of my poops influenced that song, you win nothing whatsoever. But you will feel accomplished depending on who you are!

Huh? "The song needs a name" you say? Fine. How 'bout "Pickle Surprise Jazz Hands". Kay, whatever, it's 1.A.M.
